item_titles: AI chatbots reading X-rays can be dangerously confident even when they're wrong
AI is more likely than humans to form biases when hiring
clusters.summary: AI 在招聘中比人类更容易形成偏见，且在解读 X 光片等医疗诊断时即使出错也表现得过度自信，这凸显了高风险应用中AI的可靠性问题。
clusters.title: AI 在招聘和医疗影像中的偏见与过度自信风险

item_titles: Moonshot pauses new Kimi K3 subscriptions after GPU demand maxes out in 48 hours
Kimi: Threat or menace?
Moonshot's Kimi K3 outperforms Fable 5 in frontend code but lags far behind in complex math
clusters.summary: 月之暗面发布 Kimi K3 模型，因需求过大暂停新订阅。该模型在前端代码能力上超越 Fable 5，但在复杂数学上落后，引发了业界关于中国AI竞争的广泛讨论。
clusters.title: 月之暗面 Kimi K3 模型引发热议

item_titles: Large Language Models as Unified Multimodal Learners for Clinical Prediction
EpiNarrate: Agentic Generation of Grounded Narratives from Epidemiological Scenario Projections
Cura 1T: Specialized Model for Agentic Healthcare
clusters.summary: 发布了涵盖电子病历临床预测的统一多模态模型、面向医疗智能体的专用模型 Cura 1T，以及能从流行病学预测生成叙事的 EpiNarrate。
clusters.title: 医疗与公共卫生领域的专用大模型

item_titles: ToolVerse: Unlocking Massive Environments and Long-Horizon Tasks for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
